work_model.source_quote: you can work remotely, from one of our stylish hubs, or even a bit of both

location.source_quote: Engineering Senior Frontend Engineer UK, Portugal, Ireland

requirements.text: Deep proficiency in TypeScript, React, and CSS
requirements.source_quote: Deep proficiency in TypeScript, React, and CSS

requirements.text: Track record leading medium-to-large frontend initiatives end-to-end at scale
requirements.source_quote: a track record of leading medium-to-large frontend initiatives end-to-end at scale

requirements.text: Hands-on design-system experience as both consumer and contributor, ideally driving adoption across multiple products
requirements.source_quote: Hands-on experience with design systems as both a consumer and a contributor, ideally driving adoption across multiple products

requirements.text: Ability to shape and enhance a design system with product designers and drive consistency across products
requirements.source_quote: Shape and enhance our design system in collaboration with product designers, driving adoption across multiple products

requirements.text: Strong user-experience craft and attention to high-fidelity, accessible UI at scale
requirements.source_quote: ensure that our UI surfaces remain consistent, accessible, and high-fidelity at scale

requirements.text: Mentoring experience and ability to level up engineering practices
Strong written and verbal communication with product managers, designers, technical writers, engineers, and non-technical colleagues
requirements.source_quote: strong written and verbal communication that works well with non-technical colleagues

requirements.text: Proactive improvement of code, team processes, and the development lifecycle from design through deployment and maintenance
requirements.source_quote: A proactive attitude towards finding ways to improve the code and team processes

requirements.text: Product mindset with pride in user outcomes, detail, and edge cases for sellers and developers
requirements.source_quote: A product mindset and pride in what you build

requirements.text: DevOps ownership for shipping code to production and supporting and monitoring performance
requirements.source_quote: Practise DevOps: you're responsible for getting your code to production, supporting and monitoring its performance

requirements.text: Experience contributing high-quality TypeScript and React code in a large codebase used by several teams
requirements.source_quote: Contribute high-quality TypeScript and React code in a large codebase used by several teams

requirements.text: Frontend platform familiarity with React Router 7 for dashboard work and Astro for docs work
requirements.source_quote: alongside React Router 7 on the dashboard side and Astro on the docs side

requirements.text: Experience with developer-facing surfaces, documentation platforms, SDKs, public libraries, or integration tooling
requirements.source_quote: owning our docs platform at developer.paddle.com, our SDKs and public libraries, and the tooling that makes integrating with Paddle simple and enjoyable

requirements.text: Ability to own technical direction and lifecycle of products and tooling, including public libraries such as Paddle.js and Node SDKs
requirements.source_quote: Own the technical direction and lifecycle of products and tooling in your remit, including public libraries like Paddle.js and our Node SDK

requirements.text: Active curiosity about AI with hands-on use in day-to-day software development
requirements.source_quote: An active curiosity about AI and how it's reshaping software development, with hands-on use already part of your day-to-day

requirements.text: Interest in payment infrastructure, merchant-of-record products, seller dashboards, and developer experience for integrations
requirements.source_quote: Paddle offers digital product companies a completely different approach to their payment infrastructure

responsibilities.text: Lead frontend work across the seller dashboard, docs platform, app marketplace, and developer-experience initiatives.
Own technical direction, rollout, maintenance, and lifecycle of products and integration tooling such as Paddle.js and the Node SDK.
Collaborate with designers to shape the design system and drive consistent, accessible UI across multiple products.
Mentor engineers, lead technical planning, and improve quality with attention to edge cases.
Collaborate end-to-end with product managers, designers, technical writers, and engineers from concept through rollout.

success_outcomes.text: Paddle sellers get richer, seamless dashboard experiences that help them run and grow their businesses.
Developers can integrate Paddle more easily through better docs, SDKs, public libraries, and tooling.
Frontend teams adopt a consistent design system and ship accessible, high-fidelity UI at scale.
Frontend delivery improves through better code quality, process improvements, production ownership, and guild-level practices.

keyword_signals.reason: Core must-have technology repeated in role requirements and responsibilities.
Core frontend framework and ATS term for the role.

Repeated across role scope, requirements, and success outcomes.

One of the hiring teams owns docs, SDKs, libraries, and integration tooling.
Developer Experience team owns SDKs and public libraries.
Explicit role responsibility for Paddle.js and Node SDK lifecycle.
Specific dashboard technology called out by the JD.
Specific docs platform technology called out by the JD.
The role explicitly expects production shipping, support, and monitoring ownership.
Paddle calls for hands-on AI curiosity in day-to-day development.
Company-specific domain term that can support targeted motivation if grounded.

screening_priorities.reason: Core screening will likely start with senior frontend depth in TypeScript, React, CSS, and large shared codebases.
screening_priorities.evidence: Deep proficiency in TypeScript, React, and CSS

screening_priorities.reason: Design-system contribution and adoption are central to the Dashboard team and Experience Group scope.
screening_priorities.evidence: shapes our design system to drive consistency and adoption across multiple products

screening_priorities.reason: This senior role requires technical planning, mentoring, communication, and engineering-practice improvement.
screening_priorities.evidence: mentoring other engineers, leading the technical planning of team initiatives

screening_priorities.reason: Developer Experience signals matter because one hiring team owns docs, SDKs, public libraries, and integration tooling.
screening_priorities.evidence: owning our docs platform at developer.paddle.com, our SDKs and public libraries

screening_priorities.reason: Product mindset, production ownership, and AI curiosity are differentiators for seniority and day-to-day fit.
screening_priorities.evidence: you think about the people using what you ship, whether sellers or developers
